title: Preparation of PEI for primary coating of MaxOne (neuronal cultures)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"45u5a","text":"Polyethyleneimine (PEI) coating to enhance cell adhesion on MaxOne chips. PEI coating is followed by Laminin coating.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare 100 mL of 1X borate buffer: 5 mL, 20X borate buffer 95 mL, sterile deionized water

7% PEI stock solution : 1.4 mL, 50% = PEI solution directly into a sterile beaker. 8.6 mL, 1X borate buffer into the sterile beaker. Mix 00:30:00 using a magnetic stirrer until fully dissolved (can be stored in 0.5 mL aliquots at -20°C for 1 month). Where is it sterilized? -
Pierce™ 20X Borate Buffer Thermo Fisher Catalog #28341 Poly(ethyleneimine) solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P3143 (CAS: 9002-98-6)
final 0.07% PEI solution 0.5 mL, 7% PEI solution in 49.5 mL, 1X borate buffer fresh filter through a 0.22 μm filter unit before use!
creator: Yonatan Katz
